title: PvP Gamerule
description: Adds a simple PvP toggle gamerule.
body:
# PvP Gamerule
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pvp-gamerule)
[![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tClfEV9G8os" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Adds the `pvp` gamerule (`true` by default). Set it to `false` to disables player-versus-player combat.

## FAQ
- **Will this work on LAN Hosted Worlds?**

> Yes.

- **What about the `pvp` setting in the `server.properties`?**

> Completely ignored, the gamerule always takes priority.

- **How is PvP defined? What will be disabled?**

> Behaves the same as changing the `pvp` setting in the `server.properties` just as a gamerule.
